title: Rain Rain Go Go Lyrics Pokkiri Raja
stanzas: <div>Rain Rain Go Go Lyrics Pokkiri Raja

Rain rain Rain rain
go go go go
endhan poovai nee
kuththaathe po po.(2)

Rain rain Rain rain
go go go go
kutti poovai nee
kuththaathe po po(2)

sillendru sillendru
nenjukkul peigiraai hoi.
ullukkul minnalgal
ennenna seigiraai hoi.

alaiyaaga aasaithaavum
maazhaiyaaga maari thoovum.
idhazhodu thaagamo
idhu kadhal neramo..

Rain rain Rain rain
go go go go
endhan poovai nee
kuththaathe po po

Rain rain Rain rain
go go go go
kutti poovai nee
kuththaathe po po

padapada vizhigalil
pada pada virigiraai
thoorangal thoolaaguthe

pudhu suga veligalil
puyalena thirigiraai
paadhai paalaaguthe

nigazhaatha kaayamaaga
kadhal pogum endru paarthen.
visaiyaaga maari ennai
eerkka naanum kaigal korthen.

nanaiyaatha paagam yedhum
illai yaavum undhan
nizhalil pozhiyum nanaiyum

Rain rain Rain rain
go go go go
endhan poovai nee
kuththaathe po po

Rain rain Rain rain
go go go go
kutti poovai nee
kuththaathe po po

unadhuyir karaiyumaa
enai vandhu adaiyuma
kaiyyodu kai serumaa

vizhi vazhi nulaiyumaa
idhayathil nulaiyumaa
vazhve nee endraagumaa

idhunaal varai
un swaasam theendidaatha
paavi annaen.

undhan moochin vetpam
theenda theenda
aavi aagi ponen.

idhupodhum vazhndhu
paarthu inbam thaakkuthennai
idhuve ulagin mudivu.

sillendru sillendru
nenjukkul peigiraai hoi.
ullukkul minnalgal
ennenna seigiraai hoi.

alaiyaaga aasaithaavum
maazhaiyaaga maari thoovum.
idhazhodu thaagamo
idhu kadhal neramo..

Rain rain Rain rain
go go go go
endhan poovai nee
kuththaathe po po

go go go go

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Rain Rain Go Go conveys a playful and joyful vibe, celebrating love and happiness.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Pokkiri Raja, this song highlights the carefree moments of the characters, adding a fun element to the storyline.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Neeti Mohan and Varun Parandhaman, with music composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

Rain Rain Go Go was released on March 4, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Rain Rain Go Go, the characters of Pokkiri Raja express their youthful exuberance through a lively and catchy tune. The song captures the essence of carefree moments filled with joy and celebration. With its upbeat rhythm and playful lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and nostalgia. This track is perfect for parties and celebrations, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rain Rain Go Go from Pokkiri Raja is a vibrant celebration of joy and playfulness, perfectly encapsulating the spirit of youth. With the enchanting voices of Neeti Mohan and Varun Parandhaman, this track brings a refreshing energy that is hard to resist. Dive into this catchy melody that promises to uplift your mood and get you dancing!
stanzaMeanings: Rain, rain, go away, don't disturb my flower, go away.
Rain, rain, go away, don't disturb my little flower, go away.
You are quietly whispering in my heart. What are you doing inside?
Like a wave, it comes and goes like rain. Is this love or just a passing moment?
Rain, rain, go away, don't disturb my flower, go away.
Rain, rain, go away, don't disturb my little flower, go away.
In the eyes, there are tears falling, the sounds are echoing.
In new joyful paths, you are turning like a storm.
I saw that love will not leave me. I also held my hands to change my fate.
There is nothing that can be held onto, everything will flow away in your shadow.
Rain, rain, go away, don't disturb my flower, go away.
Rain, rain, go away, don't disturb my little flower, go away.
Will your life come to me and hold my hand?
Will your eyes guide me or will your heart lead me?
Because of this, I am a sinner who cannot breathe until you come.
Your breath is like a fire that I cannot escape from.
Seeing this, I find joy in the pain, this is the end of the world.
You are quietly whispering in my heart. What are you doing inside?
Like a wave, it comes and goes like rain. Is this love or just a passing moment?
Rain, rain, go away, don't disturb my flower, go away.
Rain, rain, go away, don't disturb my little flower, go away.
